html:
Exclusive to:

ItemBuff StartBuff Ends

“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.

Eating a dish spiced with Chili Flakes adds 20% damage to their attacks.

Duration 4 minutes.

Also raises temperature 15 degrees for 15 seconds.”

-

Chili Flakes are an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Peppers at the Portable Grinding Mill.

Chili Flakes can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station. Seasoned dishes gain the adjective Spicy before their names. After eating a seasoned dish, the player deals 20% more damage for half a day, or 4 minutes, and their temperature increases by 15° for 15 seconds.

Eating multiple dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes does not stack the effect, but does reset the effect duration.

Example

Trivia

  • Both Wilson and Woodie refer to Chili Flakes as a fluid or sauce, despite it being neither.

Gallery

  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes.
  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes in inventory.
  • Dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes appear with a plate on the ground.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Chili Flakes
"Spicy flakes that pack a punch."
Object Info
Perk
Increases damage by 20% when combined with a Crock Pot dish.
Does not spoil
40
Crafting
×3
Amount produced
2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"spice_chili"
Exclusive to:
ItemBuff StartBuff Ends
“A flagon of fiery fluid.”
–Wilson
“I like the way it sets my mouth on fire.”
–Willow
“Is mighty spicy, but Wolfgang can take it.”
–Wolfgang
“Full of more vitality than I'm used to.”
–Wendy
“FLESHSACKS USE IT TO SET THEIR MOUTHS ON FIRE”
–WX-78
“I'm not a fan of spicy food.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yep. That's a spicy sauce.”
–Woodie
“Bit of a kick in the pants.”
–Maxwell
“Full öf a fiery extract.”
–Wigfrid
“Ho! Ha! That's spicy!”
–Webber
“My own special recipe.”
–Warly
“Makes mouth on fire!”
–Wormwood
“Just smelling it is making my eyes water.”
–Winona
“I'll spike some mortal's food. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Hot bits!”
–Wurt
“A little bit of spice never hurt anyone.”
–Walter
“Best used in minute amounts.”
–Wanda
“Let me at 'em!”
–Wilson
“You wanna fight?!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang even mightier than was before!”
–Wolfgang
“It must be my imagination, but I feel a little stronger...”
–Wendy
“I HAVE BEEN OPTIMIZED FOR COMBAT”
–WX-78
“My, I feel full of vim and vigor!”
–Wickerbottom
“I feel strong as a grizzly bear!”
–Woodie
“I'm not afraid of some fisticuffs!”
–Maxwell
“My warrior's spirit is invigorated!”
–Wigfrid
“We feel so strong!”
–Webber
“Try my new specialty - an open-faced knuckle sandwich!”
–Warly
“Feel stronger!”
–Wormwood
“Time to give 'em the old one-two!”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, I'm ready to play!”
–Wortox
“Wanna fight!”
–Wurt
“Woah! I feel like I can take on the world!”
–Walter
“I want to punch something!!”
–Wanda
“It seems my brawniness was short-lived.”
–Wilson
“Nooo I still had more hitting I wanted to do!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang still strong! Just little less strong!”
–Wolfgang
“My strength is fading.”
–Wendy
“BATTLE MODE: EXPIRED”
–WX-78
“Oh my, what came over me?”
–Wickerbottom
“Sorry, all the fight's gone out of me.”
–Woodie
“My strength has left me.”
–Maxwell
“Back to merely my usual level of fearsomeness.”
–Wigfrid
“We're tired of fighting!”
–Webber
“Erm... I think I'm more of a food lover than a fighter after all.”
–Warly
“Feel less fighty now”
–Wormwood
“Y'know, fightin' ain't always the answer.”
–Winona
“It was all just a prank!”
–Wortox
“Don't feel like fighting anymore.”
–Wurt
“Huh? My punches feel wimpier... not that I was wimpy before!”
–Walter
“Whew, I don't know what came over me...”
–Wanda
“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.
Eating a dish spiced with Chili Flakes adds 20% damage to their attacks.
Duration 4 minutes.
Also raises temperature 15 degrees for 15 seconds.”
-
Chili Flakes are an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. They can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Peppers at the Portable Grinding Mill.
Chili Flakes can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station. Seasoned dishes gain the adjective Spicy before their names. After eating a seasoned dish, the player deals 20% more damage for half a day, or 4 minutes, and their temperature increases by 15° for 15 seconds.
Eating multiple dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes does not stack the effect, but does reset the effect duration.
Example[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Both Wilson and Woodie refer to Chili Flakes as a fluid or sauce, despite it being neither.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Overlay for dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes.
Overlay for dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes in inventory.
Dishes seasoned with Chili Flakes appear with a plate on the ground.
